name: sequencer
title: Enterprise L2 Sequencer: Single-Operator Block Production with Forced Inclusion
hypothesis: A single-operator sequencer can produce L2 blocks every 1-2 seconds with FIFO ordering while a forced inclusion mechanism via L1 guarantees censorship resistance with maximum 24-hour latency for forced transactions.
null_hypothesis: Single-operator block production cannot sustain 1-2 second block times under enterprise workloads, OR forced inclusion via L1 cannot guarantee sub-24-hour inclusion latency.
predictions: Block production latency < 50ms per block at 100 TPS
Mempool can sustain 500+ TPS insertion rate
FIFO ordering deviation < 1% under normal load
Forced inclusion queue drains within deadline even under adversarial sequencer
Block fill ratio > 80% at steady-state 200 TPS
prior_work: RU-L1: EVM Executor (complete) -- provides execution engine that sequencer feeds
RU-V4: Batch Aggregation -- HYBRID batching strategy validated
RU-V5: Enterprise Node -- pipelined architecture pattern established
